summary: The implementation closely matches the BuildRequest with all five pages (password, puzzle, gift, birthday, final message) implemented with correct validations, messages, and styling. The purple gradient theme with Comic Sans MS font and specified colors is applied. All auto-advance timings are correct (1.5s for puzzle success, 4s for gift reveal). Minor discrepancies exist in button styling implementation details.

hallucinated_features.description: Added 'Plot twist ✨' text in gift reveal message
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest specifies exact gift message text without 'Plot twist ✨' prefix

hallucinated_features.description: Button component uses Tailwind/shadcn color tokens instead of exact hex colors
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-6 specifies buttons should use #d8b4f8 background and #c084fc on hover, but implementation uses CSS custom properties (oklch color tokens) instead of these exact hex values

hallucinated_features.description: Input component styling uses custom color tokens instead of white background with purple text
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-6 implies inputs should follow the white text theme, but the input component uses custom color variables that may not match the exact specification
